data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Apple's website is built to be responsive, providing a seamless experience across various devices.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes CSS media queries and flexible grid layouts.

data.title: Custom CMS
data.description: A custom content management system powers the dynamic aspects of the site.
data.technical_spec: Built with proprietary and open-source technologies to manage content efficiently.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Decoupled services architecture for independent component updating and scaling.
data.technical_spec: Uses RESTful APIs for communication between services.

data.title: CDN Optimization
data.description: Content is delivered via a content delivery network to ensure fast load times globally.
data.technical_spec: Leverages global CDN providers like Akamai.

data.title: Serverless Functions
data.description: Serverless computing is utilized for scalable and efficient request handling.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using AWS Lambda or equivalent solutions.
